ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_group" INTEGER /* Grouping of boroughs */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_group FOREIGN KEY ("borough_group") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "confirmed_case_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "probable_case_count" INTEGER /* Number of probable COVID-19 cases */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "confirmed_case_rate" REAL /* Rate of confirmed COVID-19 cases per capita */,
  "case_rate" REAL /* Rate of total COVID-19 cases per capita */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the case count was recorded */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta", "date", "age_group", "gender", "ethnicity")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_deaths" (
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "confirmed_death_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 deaths */,
  "probable_death_count" INTEGER /* Number of probable COVID-19 deaths */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "confirmed_death_rate" REAL /* Rate of confirmed COVID-19 deaths per capita */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Rate of total COVID-19 deaths per capita */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the death count was recorded */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deaths */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deaths */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta", "date", "age_group", "gender", "ethnicity")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "percent_positive" REAL /* Percentage of positive COVID-19 tests */,
  "total_covid_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests administered */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Breakdown of the population by age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Breakdown of the population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Breakdown of the population by ethnicity */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the borough */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing site */,
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the testing site */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the testing site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tests that can be conducted per day */,
  "current_load" INTEGER /* Current number of tests being conducted per day */,
  "wait_time" TEXT /* Average wait time for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_sites_zcta FOREIGN KEY ("zcta") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("zcta")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health resource */,
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of health resource (e.g., hospital beds, ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the health resource available */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Utilization rate of the health resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_resources_zcta FOREIGN KEY ("zcta") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("zcta")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view data, run analysis) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Type of device and browser used to access the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data updated */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the data update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_zcta FOREIGN KEY ("zcta") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("zcta")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "zcta" TEXT /* ZIP Code Tabulation Area */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., case trends, resource allocation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zcta FOREIGN KEY ("zcta") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("zcta")
)
